sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87668" key="prokatakri/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προκατα-κρίνω</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">[ῑ]</foreign>, <sense id="n87668.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">form a prejudgement of,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῶν ἀνθρωπείων τὴν ἀδηλότητα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.112d</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">reject in comparison with,</tr_> <abbr TEIform="abbr">f.l. in</abbr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.207</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Strat.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
